title: Day 5: US assets hit across Mid-East; Israel launches fresh strikes on Iran, Lebanon
summary_full: Intense fighting grips the Middle East as Iran and the US-Israeli alliance escalate conflict. Tehran faces sustained strikes on military and nuclear sites, retaliating with attacks on regional US assets and Israel. Casualties mount on both sides, with evacuations underway for foreign nationals. The future leadership of Iran remains uncertain amidst the escalating violence.
